claim_boundary: Supported exact-row smoke for this exact Qwen3 Q8_0 GGUF on Windows x86_64 (MSVC), ChatML chat with thinking DISABLED, short-chat envelope. Token+text identical to the recorded llama.cpp comparator at 1/5/50 on the listed prompts, on the x86_q8 AVX2 path and the cpu_reference path. NOT claimed: other Qwen3 sizes/variants/quants, base variants, Qwen3-MoE (A3B), longer/model-native context, thinking-mode, WebUI smoke on Windows, production throughput, or broad Qwen-family support.
